title: dianthus × callizonoides
intro: Dianthus × callizonoides, also known as the fragrant pink dianthus, is a hybrid plant species in the carnation family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × callizonoides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
